creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Build of this port fails with plist error as following.

===========================================================================
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%/spec/fixtures/unit/util/purgeable/managed_one/managed_subdir_1/managed_symlink_file
Error: Orphaned: %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%/spec/fixtures/unit/util/purgeable/managed_one/managed_subdir_1/unmanaged_symlink_dir
Error: Orphaned: %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%/spec/fixtures/unit/util/purgeable/managed_one/managed_symlink_dir
Error: Orphaned: %%GEM_LIB_DIR%%/spec/fixtures/unit/util/purgeable/managed_one/unmanaged_symlink_file
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/rubygem-r10k
=>> Error: check-plist failures detected

Full build log: https://people.freebsd.org/~yasu/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/130amd64-default-rubygems/2021-12-22_16h59m20s/logs/rubygem-r10k-3.14.0.log
